query: SELECT r.id, r.tmdbId, r.mediaType, r.title as reviewTitle, (SELECT vh.title FROM viewing_history vh WHERE vh.tmdbId = r.tmdbId AND vh.mediaType = r.mediaType LIMIT 1) as contentTitle FROM reviews r ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2ZhujiYnxXczSgu.root --database Cvg8278ofufQzThj4s4h83 --execute SELECT r.id, r.tmdbId, r.mediaType, r.title as reviewTitle, (SELECT vh.title FROM viewing_history vh WHERE vh.tmdbId = r.tmdbId AND vh.mediaType = r.mediaType LIMIT 1) as contentTitle FROM reviews r ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
